ddls:
CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which data is collected */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the population is recorded */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total civilian noninstitutional population */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing age distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing ethnicity distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_force" (
  "labor_force_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor force record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the labor force is recorded */,
  "total_labor_force" INTEGER /* Total civilian labor force */,
  "percent_population_in_labor_force" REAL /* Percentage of population in the labor force */,
  "male_labor_force" INTEGER /* Number of males in the labor force */,
  "female_labor_force" INTEGER /* Number of females in the labor force */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing age distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing ethnicity distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("labor_force_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the employment is recorded */,
  "total_employed_population" INTEGER /* Total employed population */,
  "percent_employed_population" REAL /* Percentage of population employed */,
  "male_employed_population" INTEGER /* Number of employed males */,
  "female_employed_population" INTEGER /* Number of employed females */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing age distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing ethnicity distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agriculture_employment" (
  "agriculture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural employment record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the agricultural employment is recorded */,
  "agriculture_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in agriculture */,
  "male_agriculture_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employed males in agriculture */,
  "female_agriculture_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employed females in agriculture */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing age distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing ethnicity distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agriculture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agriculture_employment_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonagriculture_employment" (
  "nonagriculture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-agricultural employment record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the non-agricultural employment is recorded */,
  "nonagriculture_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in non-agriculture */,
  "male_nonagriculture_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employed males in non-agriculture */,
  "female_nonagriculture_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employed females in non-agriculture */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing age distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing ethnicity distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nonagriculture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonagriculture_employment_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment" (
  "unemployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the unemployment is recorded */,
  "number_unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed individuals */,
  "percent_unemployed" REAL /* Percentage of population unemployed */,
  "male_unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed males */,
  "female_unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed females */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing age distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing ethnicity distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unemployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "not_in_labor_force" (
  "not_in_labor_force_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each not-in-labor-force record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the data is recorded */,
  "number_not_in_labor_force" INTEGER /* Number of individuals not in the labor force */,
  "male_not_in_labor_force" INTEGER /* Number of males not in the labor force */,
  "female_not_in_labor_force" INTEGER /* Number of females not in the labor force */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing age distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object storing ethnicity distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("not_in_labor_force_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_not_in_labor_force_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced, 3 for admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which the data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
